CustomTab.description: Full-bleed (no Salesforce chrome) entry point for the Pro Forma Timeline gantt. Backed by the DeliveryGanttStandalone Visualforce page + c:DeliveryTimelineOut Lightning Out app — bypasses the Lightning app header + nav + Custom Tab icon rows that the FlexiPage-backed Delivery_Gantt_Standalone tab inherits. URL: /apex/delivery__DeliveryGanttStandalone (via /lightning/n/Delivery_Gantt_Full_Bleed).
CustomTab.label: Gantt — Full Bleed
